Step.label: Log Result
Step.notes: "Check QueueCondition : " & sStatistic & "(" & sWorkgroup & " " & sOperator & " " & sValue & "). Result = " & Test(p_bResult, "true", "false") & " " & toS(iResult) & " " & sOperator & " " & toS(iValue)

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: "Check QueueCondition : " & sStatistic & "(" & sWorkgroup & " " & sOperator & " " & sValue & "). Result = " & Test(p_bResult, "true", "false") & " " & toS(iResult) & " " & sOperator & " " & toS(iValue)

Parameter.label: Acd Item is in Queue Timeout
Acd Interaction Is Currently On Hold
Acd Queue That Interaction is Assigned to
Number of Agents in Follow Up
Longest Time an Agent has been Available
Longest Wait Time for a Call
Average Wait Time for Connected Calls
Average Wait Time for Abandoned Calls
Average Follow Up Time for Connected Calls
Denominator for Average Follow Up Time

Step.label: iResult
Step.notes: Test(StrEqlNoCase(sStatistic, "PositionInQueue"), iAcdStatPosition, Test(StrEqlNoCase(sStatistic, "EstimatedWaitTime"), iAcdStatEstWaitTime, Test(StrEqlNoCase(sStatistic, "TimeInQueue"), iAcdInteractionTimeInQueue, 0)))

Parameter.name: RHS
Parameter.value: Test(StrEqlNoCase(sStatistic, "PositionInQueue"), iAcdStatPosition, Test(StrEqlNoCase(sStatistic, "EstimatedWaitTime"), iAcdStatEstWaitTime, Test(StrEqlNoCase(sStatistic, "TimeInQueue"), iAcdInteractionTimeInQueue, 0)))

Parameter.label: Number of Agents in Follow Up
Longest Time an Agent has been Available
Longest Wait Time for a Call
Average Wait Time for Connected Calls
Average Wait Time for Abandoned Calls
Average Follow Up Time for Connected Calls
Denominator for Average Follow Up Time
Number of Agents in Follow Up
Longest Time an Agent has been Available
Longest Wait Time for a Call
Average Wait Time for Connected Calls
Average Wait Time for Abandoned Calls
Average Follow Up Time for Connected Calls
Denominator for Average Follow Up Time
